title: claude-profiles global config
description: User-level config for the claude-profiles plugin. Located at $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/claude-profiles/config.json (default ~/.config/claude-profiles/config.json).

version.description: Config schema version. Bumped on breaking format changes.

sources.description: Profile sources. Each is a git repo whose branches are profiles. (Issue #1: multiple sources.)

promoteMode.description: When /claude-profiles:configure promotes skills/agents/commands/hooks from user space into a profile: copy (keep in ~/.claude), move (remove from ~/.claude), or ask each time. Default: ask.

name.description: Stable identifier for this source, referenced by a workspace marker's `source` field.

repo.description: Git URL or local path of the profiles repo.

default.description: Marks the default source used when none is specified. At most one source should set this true.

profiles.description: Locally cached list of profile branches on this source, with optional descriptions. (Issue #3.)

branch.description: Branch name on the source repo.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this profile is for, shown when picking a profile.
